stdout:
Table	Create Table
test_scenarios	CREATE TABLE `test_scenarios` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `scenario_code` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `profile_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `test_type` enum('VABF','VSR','VABE') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('DRAFT','FINAL','DEPRECATED') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  `version` int(11) DEFAULT '1',
  `steps` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `required_dataset_types` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `artifact_policy` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `kpi_thresholds` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `test_scenarios_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_scenarios_project` (`project_id`),
  KEY `idx_scenarios_profile` (`profile_id`),
  KEY `idx_scenarios_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_scenarios_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
